ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agriculture, forestry and fishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_sectors" (
  "sub_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-sector */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the sub-sector belongs to */,
  "sub_sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-sector (e.g., Crops, Livestock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-sector */,
  "sub_sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sub-sector */,
  "sub_sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sub-sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, employment rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator (e.g., millions of dollars, percentage) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_data" (
  "sector_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data" REAL /* Economic data value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_sector_data" (
  "sub_sector_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sub_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-sector the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data" REAL /* Economic data value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_sector_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sector_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sector_data_sub_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_sector_id") REFERENCES sub_sectors ("sub_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device/browser used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (e.g., 2011-12) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the analysis belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the analysis was performed */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP value for the sector */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the sector */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analysis_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analysis_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_sector_analysis" (
  "sub_sector_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sub_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-sector the analysis belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the analysis was performed */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP value for the sub-sector */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the sub-sector */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_sector_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sector_analysis_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sector_analysis_sub_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_sector_id") REFERENCES sub_sectors ("sub_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the report belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., GDP, employment) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device/browser used to access the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_config" TEXT /* Configuration for the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., GDP, employment) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_access" (
  "dashboard_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dashboard */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dashboard was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device/browser used to access the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_access_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
